title: The Associated Press: Trump’s Latest Immigration Move Clouds the Path to Green Cards | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP
content:
## The Associated Press: Trump’s Latest Immigration Move Clouds the Path to Green Cards

A new USCIS policy requiring most green card applicants in the United States to apply from their home countries is creating uncertainty about how it will be implemented in practice. In an article published in The Associated Press , Partner Kevin Miner said he expects employment-based visa categories, including H-1B dual intent cases, would likely remain exempt under the memo’s framework and continue under existing practice.
